Admissions Open 2026–27 Nursery to 8th CBSE Based Recognised by Bihar Government

Where academics meet character.

"If Labour is Pure, Then Success is Sure"

A complete English-medium school in Bagaha Sonbarsa, Sitamarhi — combining CBSE-based modern education with disciplined values, spoken English, computer learning, and an optional Deeni Talim track from the foundational years.

Monthly fee: ₹400  |  Deeni Talim (Urdu): ₹100 extra

Apply for Admission Call 86516 14148

Leadership

Guided by Experience & Values

New Moon Public School is led by a Director and Principal committed to blending strong academics with discipline and moral grounding. Run & Managed By Afraz Alam Manoj Jha Educational Trust.

Director

Maulana Afraz Alam Al-Mazahiri

Leading the school's vision since its establishment in 2008, overseeing both the academic direction and the school's Deeni Talim programme, ensuring students grow with strong character alongside modern education.

Principal

Manoj Jha

I.Sc (Math) · B.A Hindi (Hons) · D.El.Ed (NIOS) · CTET-CBSE

Heads the day-to-day academic administration, curriculum delivery, and student progress monitoring across Nursery to Class 8, with a focus on the CBSE-based pattern and spoken English.

Academics & Facilities

A Complete English Medium School

Smart teaching methods, activity-based learning, and full facilities designed for holistic growth.

Key Features

  • Experienced & qualified teachers
  • Smart teaching method
  • Spoken English & personality development
  • Computer education from basic classes
  • Arts, crafts & drawing activities
  • Activity-based learning (play-way method)
  • Safe campus & discipline
  • Weekly test & regular progress report

हमारी विशेषताएँ

  • अंग्रेजी बोल-चाल पर विशेष ध्यान
  • प्रशिक्षित एवं अनुभवी शिक्षक
  • शुरुआत से कंप्यूटर की प्रैक्टिकल पढ़ाई
  • स्कूल परिसर में खेल-कूद की सुविधा
  • आवश्यकता पड़ने पर चिकित्सा की सुविधा
  • लाइब्रेरी की सुविधा
  • स्कूल परिसर में हॉस्टल सुविधा
دینی تعلیم

Deeni Talim (Optional System)

A flexible track for families who want religious grounding alongside — or instead of — the regular curriculum, from Baghdadi Qaida up to the 8th level.

  • बगदादी क़ायदा से अरबी सोम तक (8वें स्तर तक) इच्छानुसार सुनियोजित तालीम
  • स्कूल के साथ दीन की मज़बूत तालीम
  • अरबी व फारसी व्याकरण तथा तर्जुम-ए-कुरआन पर मजबूत पकड़
  • लचीली शिक्षा – केवल स्कूल या दीनी + दुनियावी दोनों विकल्प उपलब्ध
  • आलिम बनने के साथ-साथ Doctor, Engineer, Teacher व अन्य क्षेत्रों में आगे बढ़ने का अवसर
Achievements & Beyond

Our Students Go Further

15+

Students from our institution are currently studying at AMU (Aligarh Muslim University) and JMI (Jamia Millia Islamia). Several of them have also cleared competitive exams such as NEET.

AMU
Aligarh Muslim University
JMI
Jamia Millia Islamia

Special Preparation — After Class 8

For students moving to Class 9, we provide focused preparation for admission into premier institutions:

  • JMI — Jamia Millia Islamia entrance guidance
  • AMU — Aligarh Muslim University entrance guidance
Our Campus

Growing, Brick by Brick

Our campus is expanding steadily — new classrooms and a boundary wall under construction to give students a safer, bigger home to learn in.

Hurry Up — Admission Going On

Admissions Open for 2026–27

Seats available across Nursery to Class 8 in our CBSE-based English medium programme, with the option to add Deeni Talim.

  • Call the school office or visit the campus at Muhchatti Road, Bagaha Sonbarsa.
  • Collect and fill the admission form for the desired class.
  • Submit required documents (birth certificate, previous school records, photographs).
  • Confirm seat on verification and fee submission.

Zakat & Donation

❤️ Support a Child's Education

Many students from New Moon Public School have successfully continued their higher education at prestigious institutions like Jamia Millia Islamia and Aligarh Muslim University. However, many talented children from financially weaker families are still unable to achieve their dreams due to financial difficulties.

Your contribution can help provide free education, books, uniforms, and learning support to deserving students. Every donation, no matter the amount, can make a lasting difference in a child's life.

शिक्षा में सहयोग करें

न्यू मून पब्लिक स्कूल के कई विद्यार्थी आगे की पढ़ाई के लिए जामिया मिल्लिया इस्लामिया और अलीगढ़ मुस्लिम विश्वविद्यालय जैसे प्रतिष्ठित संस्थानों तक पहुँचे हैं। फिर भी आर्थिक रूप से कमजोर कई प्रतिभाशाली बच्चे अपनी शिक्षा पूरी नहीं कर पाते।

आपका सहयोग ऐसे बच्चों को निःशुल्क शिक्षा, पुस्तकें, यूनिफॉर्म और शैक्षणिक सहायता उपलब्ध कराने में मदद करेगा। आपका हर छोटा-बड़ा योगदान एक बच्चे का भविष्य बदल सकता है।
